title: US citizen seek millions in damages after violent ICE arrests (RFC)
description_html: Several U.S. citizens are suing ICE and DHS for millions in damages, alleging they were violently arrested, unlawfully detained, and subjected to assault, battery, false imprisonment, and emotional distress despite being American citizens. The lawsuits includes cases such as a man arrested twice while at work and others caught in raids where ICE agents allegedly used excessive force.
